MaxBalanceModule.description: Cap token holdings per wallet address

CountryRestrictModule.description: Block transfers to/from wallets registered in restricted countries

params.note: Country codes per ISO 3166-1 numeric: 364=Iran, 408=North Korea, 760=Syria

TransferFeesModule.description: Collect a basis-point fee on each token transfer

TimeExchangeLimitsModule.description: Limit the volume transferable to exchanges within a time window
